message:
test: add comprehensive flywheel.ts unit tests

Add 51 bun:test unit tests covering:

Data structures:
- flywheelTools: unique IDs, valid hrefs, tool connections
- workflowScenarios: required fields, tool references
- agentPrompts: categories, tool references
- synergyExplanations: tool combinations
- flywheelDescription: metrics validation

Helper functions:
- getToolSynergy: bidirectional connection counting
- getToolsBySynergy: sorted results
- getAllConnections: unique connections
- getPromptsByCategory: filtering
- getScenarioById: lookup

All 51 tests pass with 659 assertions.

Closes bead 998a - ACTUALLY implemented (not deferred).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
